fixedTexts:
STEP 3 OF 3
Calibrate your phone's compute
A 12-second test confirms what you can earn.
WHAT WE MEASURE
NPU benchmark — decides which AI tasks your device qualifies for.
Network latency — pings three regional inference gateways over your current connection (Wi-Fi or cellular both qualify).
Power & thermal — confirms charging state and that your device can sustain workloads without throttling.
Start calibration
